'''rakava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:miasmatology|miasmatology]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-k-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:miasmatology|miasmatology]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| rakava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rækævæth|rækævæth]] || [[word:rækævæj|rækævæj]] || [[word:rækævæsh|rækævæsh]] || [[word:rækævæ|rækævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rakakavath|rakakavath]] || [[word:rakakavaj|rakakavaj]] || [[word:rakakavash|rakakavash]] || [[word:rakakava|rakakava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rakavath|rakavath]] || [[word:rakavaj|rakavaj]] || [[word:rakavash|rakavash]] || [[word:rakava|rakava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rakafvath|rakafvath]] || [[word:rakafvaj|rakafvaj]] || [[word:rakafvash|rakafvash]] || [[word:rakafvaf|rakafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rakavatha|rakavatha]] || [[word:rakavaja|rakavaja]] || [[word:rakavasha|rakavasha]] || [[word:rakavaka|rakavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rakavath|rakavath]] || [[word:rakavaj|rakavaj]] || [[word:rakavash|rakavash]] || [[word:rakava|rakava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rakavathal|rakavathal]] || [[word:rakavajal|rakavajal]] || [[word:rakavashal|rakavashal]] || [[word:rakavakal|rakavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rakavathatha|rakavathatha]] || [[word:rakavajaja|rakavajaja]] || [[word:rakavashasha|rakavashasha]] || [[word:rakavaka|rakavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rakavathan|rakavathan]] || [[word:rakavajan|rakavajan]] || [[word:rakavashan|rakavashan]] || [[word:rakavakan|rakavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rakavathaoro|rakavathaoro]] || [[word:rakavajaoro|rakavajaoro]] || [[word:rakavashaoro|rakavashaoro]] || [[word:rakavakaoro|rakavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
